allow: PowerShell(Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Enabled True | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'node|5000|expo' } | Select-Object DisplayName, Action, Profile | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('juzs[0]:', json.dumps\(d['juzs']['references'][0], ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\('hizbs[0]:', json.dumps\(d['hizbQuarters']['references'][0], ensure_ascii=False\) if 'hizbQuarters' in d else 'no hizbQuarters'\); print\('pages[0]:', json.dumps\(d['pages']['references'][0], ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/meta.json'\).data; console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('juzs.count:', d.juzs.count\); console.log\('juzs[0]:', JSON.stringify\(d.juzs.references[0]\)\); console.log\('juzs[1]:', JSON.stringify\(d.juzs.references[1]\)\); console.log\('juzs[29]:', JSON.stringify\(d.juzs.references[29]\)\); console.log\('pages.count:', d.pages.count\); console.log\('pages[0]:', JSON.stringify\(d.pages.references[0]\)\); console.log\('pages[1]:', JSON.stringify\(d.pages.references[1]\)\); console.log\('hizbs?', !!d.hizbs, 'hizbQuarters?', !!d.hizbQuarters\);")
